# Audit Log

> Tracks all findings across audit runs. Update via `audit-08-update-log.prompt.md` after each run.
> Statuses: `open` · `fixed` · `accepted` · `deferred`

Last updated: 2026-03-17

## Findings

| ID        | Title                                                                                  | Prefix | Status | Date       | Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| --------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ | ------ | ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------- |
| CRIT-001  | PHP fe80::/10 link-local range incomplete (SSRF bypass)                                | CRIT   | fixed  | 2026-03-17 | `IoLoader.php` `assertSafeUrl` + `isPrivateIpv6`: only `fe80` prefix checked; `fe81`–`febf` bypass the block. Fix: `preg_match('/^fe[89ab][0-9a-f](?::                                                       | $)/i', $cleaned)` |
| CRIT-002  | JS fetchUrl DNS-to-connection TOCTOU — IP not pinned to fetch                          | CRIT   | fixed  | 2026-03-17 | `io-loader.ts`: validated IP not passed to `fetch()`; second DNS lookup opens DNS-rebinding window. Fix: undici dispatcher with pinned `lookup` or `http.request` with custom resolver                       |
| CRIT-003  | FilterParser ReDoS guard incomplete in match()                                         | CRIT   | fixed  | 2026-03-17 | `filter-parser.ts` `evaluateFunction`: guard catches only 2 patterns, misses `(a\|aa)+` and similar alternation-based catastrophic backtracking. Fix: broaden guard or integrate `recheck`                   |
| CRIT-004  | FilterParser resolveField traverses prototype chain                                    | CRIT   | fixed  | 2026-03-17 | `filter-parser.ts` `resolveField()`: uses `key in object` (inherits prototype). Fix: `hasOwnProperty` + `SecurityGuard.assertSafeKey(key)`                                                                   |
| CRIT-005  | STRICT policy has no URL allowlist and csvMode strip not error                         | CRIT   | fixed  | 2026-03-17 | `security-policy.ts` + `SecurityPolicy.php`: STRICT_POLICY has no `url` sub-key and sets `csvMode: 'strip'` (silent mutation). Fix: set `csvMode: 'error'` and add `url: { allowedPorts: [443] }`            |
| ARCH-001  | SafeAccess.customAccessors not reset by standalone resetAll()                          | ARCH   | fixed  | 2026-03-17 | `reset-all.ts`: standalone `resetAll()` skips `SafeAccess.customAccessors`; class method `SafeAccess.resetAll()` resets all. Fix: call `SafeAccess.clearCustomAccessors()` from standalone export            |
| ARCH-002  | PathCache.enabled not restored by clear() in JS and PHP                                | ARCH   | fixed  | 2026-03-17 | `path-cache.ts` + `PathCache.php`: `clear()` empties cache but leaves `enabled = false`. Fix: add `enabled = true` / `self::$enabled = true` to `clear()`                                                    |
| ARCH-003  | applyPatch runs unconditional O(2n) preflight on every call                            | ARCH   | fixed  | 2026-03-17 | `json-patch.ts` `applyPatch()`: pre-flight always runs even when no `test` ops exist. Fix: `if (ops.some(op => op.op === 'test')) { preflight }`                                                             |
| ARCH-004  | PHP PathCache static state undocumented for long-running runtimes                      | ARCH   | open   | 2026-03-17 | `PathCache.php`: statics persist across Swoole/RoadRunner/FrankenPHP requests. Fix: add PHPDoc warning + docs section advising `PathCache::clear()` in worker boot                                           |
| ARCH-005  | deepMerge logic duplicated between deep-merger.ts and DotNotationParser                | ARCH   | open   | 2026-03-17 | `deep-merger.ts` and `dot-notation-parser.ts` both implement `mergeTwo()` independently. Fix: consolidate into `DeepMerger.mergeTwo()`                                                                       |
| QUAL-001  | eslint no-explicit-any is warn not error in JS packages                                | QUAL   | fixed  | 2026-03-17 | `eslint.config.js` (packages/js and packages/cli): `@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any: 'warn'`. Fix: change to `'error'`                                                                                    |
| STYLE-001 | deep-merger.ts assertSafeKey call undocumented                                         | STYLE  | open   | 2026-03-17 | Security guard call inline in merge algorithm has no explanatory comment. Fix: add `// prevent prototype-pollution during deep merge`                                                                        |
| STYLE-002 | data-masker.ts COMMON_SENSITIVE_KEYS list undocumented                                 | STYLE  | open   | 2026-03-17 | Hardcoded sensitive key list has no inclusion-criteria comment or standard reference. Fix: add `@see OWASP Sensitive Data Exposure` note                                                                     |
| STYLE-003 | json-patch.ts preflight double-apply missing RFC 6902 rationale                        | STYLE  | open   | 2026-03-17 | RFC 6902 §5 atomicity requirement not referenced. Fix: add inline comment `// RFC 6902 §5: ops MUST be atomic; preflight validates before mutating`                                                          |
| STYLE-005 | data-masker matchWildcard recompiles RegExp on every call                              | STYLE  | open   | 2026-03-17 | `data-masker.ts` `matchWildcard()`: `new RegExp(...)` constructed every invocation. Fix: module-level `Map<string, RegExp>` cache                                                                            |
| STYLE-006 | CsvAccessor silently drops column-mismatched rows                                      | STYLE  | open   | 2026-03-17 | `csv.accessor.ts`: rows with wrong column count are dropped with no warning, error, or audit event. Fix: add `onMismatch` option + audit emit                                                                |
| STYLE-007 | NdjsonAccessor hard-throws on any invalid line (undocumented)                          | STYLE  | open   | 2026-03-17 | `ndjson.accessor.ts`: any non-JSON line causes immediate throw with no lenient mode. Fix: add `strict: boolean` option + JSDoc                                                                               |
| PERF-001  | deep-merger structuredClone called on scalar values                                    | PERF   | fixed  | 2026-03-17 | `deep-merger.ts`: `structuredClone(value)` called unconditionally on primitives. Fix: type-guard before clone                                                                                                |
| PERF-002  | applyPatch preflight result discarded — second full traversal wasted                   | PERF   | fixed  | 2026-03-17 | `json-patch.ts`: preflight clone result thrown away; real apply re-runs full traversal. Fix: return preflight result directly when successful                                                                |
| PERF-003  | data-masker matchWildcard RegExp not cached (duplicate of STYLE-005)                   | PERF   | open   | 2026-03-17 | Same as STYLE-005 — compile-time cost paid every call. Fix: cache by pattern                                                                                                                                 |
| COV-001   | ip-range-checker v8 ignore next 5 — runtime assumption undocumented                    | COV    | open   | 2026-03-17 | `ip-range-checker.ts` inner URL catch: suppression is marginally justified (WHATWG URL normalises IPv6) but premise is undocumented in code                                                                  |
| COV-002   | ip-range-checker outer DNS catch v8 ignore — testable with mock                        | COV    | open   | 2026-03-17 | `ip-range-checker.ts` DNS catch: suppressed but can be tested with `vi.spyOn(dns.promises, 'resolve4')`                                                                                                      |
| REPO-001  | JS/CLI vitest coverage thresholds not hard-enforced in CI                              | ARCH   | open   | 2026-03-17 | `vitest.config.ts` (packages/js and packages/cli): no `thresholds` block; PHP uses `--min=95`. Fix: add `thresholds: { lines: 95, branches: 90 }`                                                            |
| GAP-001   | toJson() API signature incompatibility (bool vs int flags)                             | GAP    | open   | 2026-03-17 | JS: `toJson(pretty = false)`; PHP: `toJson(int $flags = 0)`. `toJson(true)` in PHP activates `JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR`, not pretty-print. Fix: add PHP bool overload                                             |
| GAP-002   | watchFile() return type divergence (cleanup fn vs poll/stop array)                     | GAP    | open   | 2026-03-17 | JS auto-starts and returns `() => void`; PHP returns `{poll, stop}` array requiring explicit call. Fix: document prominently; add PHP convenience wrapper                                                    |
| GAP-003   | toObject() PHP returns stdClass via JSON roundtrip vs JS plain record                  | GAP    | open   | 2026-03-17 | JS: `structuredClone` → `Record<string,unknown>`; PHP: JSON encode/decode → `stdClass`. Integer keys treated differently. Fix: PHP recursive `arrayToObject` helper                                          |
| GAP-004   | PHP getWildcard() method not present in JS                                             | GAP    | open   | 2026-03-17 | PHP exposes convenience `getWildcard()` returning array; JS uses standard `get()`. Fix: add JS equivalent or remove PHP method and document via `get()`                                                      |
| GAP-005   | fromXxx() option pattern difference (options-object vs positional bool)                | GAP    | open   | 2026-03-17 | JS: `fromJson(data, { readonly })` options-object; PHP: positional `bool $readonly = false`. Low priority cosmetic issue; document both                                                                      |
| GAP-006   | Readonly enforcement: JS deepFreeze (engine) vs PHP method-level guard only            | GAP    | open   | 2026-03-17 | JS readonly is bypass-proof at engine level; PHP `assertNotReadonly()` only in named public methods; direct `$this->data` write bypasses. Fix: make `$data` private or add `$frozen` flag                    |
| GAP-007   | NDJSON auto-detection single-line boundary difference                                  | GAP    | open   | 2026-03-17 | JS: single NDJSON line with trailing `\n` → detected; PHP: requires ≥2 non-empty lines. Fix: align PHP to `count($lines) >= 1`                                                                               |
| GAP-008   | filterAt/mapAt callback receives third arg (array) in JS, only 2 args in PHP           | GAP    | open   | 2026-03-17 | JS: `(item, index, array)`; PHP: `(value, key)`. Third arg unavailable in PHP callbacks. Fix: document difference in cross-language API reference                                                            |
| GAP-009   | PHP DeepMerger SecurityGuard skips integer keys (nested forbidden keys in list arrays) | GAP    | open   | 2026-03-17 | PHP `DeepMerger` only checks `is_string($key)` before `assertSafeKey`; forbidden keys nested inside list-array source bypass check. Fix: remove `is_string` guard; recurse into list arrays                  |
| GAP-010   | toYaml() output not deterministic across YAML library backends                         | GAP    | open   | 2026-03-17 | JS: js-yaml 2-space block; PHP: Symfony Yaml `dump($data,4,2)` or native `yaml_emit()`. Outputs differ. Fix: document; add round-trip semantic equivalence test                                              |
| GAP-011   | toXml() encoding declaration and quote escaping differ between JS and PHP              | GAP    | open   | 2026-03-17 | PHP `SimpleXMLElement::asXML()` may add `encoding="UTF-8"` declaration; JS custom builder does not. Also single-quote escaping differs. Fix: normalize XML declaration across both                           |
| GAP-013   | JSON Patch exception type names differ (Error vs InvalidArgumentException)             | GAP    | open   | 2026-03-17 | JS: `Error` for missing `from`, `JsonPatchTestFailedError` for test failure; PHP: `\InvalidArgumentException` + `JsonPatchTestFailedException`. Fix: JS should throw `InvalidFormatError` for missing-`from` |
| GAP-015   | Zod/Valibot/Yup schema adapters available in JS only                                   | GAP    | open   | 2026-03-17 | PHP has JSON Schema + Symfony Validator but no popular PHP validation library adapters. Fix: add Respect/Validation adapter                                                                                  |
| GAP-016   | PHP has 3 YAML plugin tiers vs JS 1 — selection undocumented                           | GAP    | open   | 2026-03-17 | PHP: native ext-yaml / Symfony YAML / custom (3 tiers); JS: js-yaml only. Fix: document PHP plugin selection ladder                                                                                          |
| GAP-017   | Standalone JS resetAll() export skips customAccessors; no PHP standalone equivalent    | GAP    | open   | 2026-03-17 | `reset-all.ts` standalone export misses `customAccessors`; PHP has no standalone `resetAll`. Fix: see also ARCH-001; ensure parity in docs                                                                   |
